questionHtml: Calculate the actual size of the seminiferous tubule in the area indicated by the line across it, giving the units.
markschemeHtml:
62 mm Υ400 = 0.155 mm/155 μm/micrometers/10-6 m

OR

61 mm Υ400 = 0.153 mm/153 μm/micrometers/10–6 m

Calculation and units required. Accept correct answers expressed in cm

meta.title: Calculate the actual size of the seminiferous tubule in the area indicated by the line across it, giving the units.
